revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24699703697|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Haguro Shrine (Q135194375)
| native_name = 羽黒神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Haguro Shrine (Q135194375)
| coordinates = {{coord|38.897888|141.55003}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
| deity = {{ill|Haguro Gongen|lt=Haguro Gongen|ja|羽黒権現|qid=Q24898144|1=Haguro Gongen}}
}}

{{nihongo|'''Haguro Shrine'''|羽黒神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}
* {{ill|Q126020344|ltq=Q126020344|qid=Q126020344|1=Haguro shrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11658590|ltq=Q11658590|qid=Q11658590|1=List of Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province}}
** Series ordinal: 52
** P155: {{ill|Kusuhinano Shrine|lt=Kusuhinano Shrine|qid=Q135040008|1=Kusuhinano Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q135040010|ltq=Q135040010|qid=Q135040010|1=Ihinoyamano Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q907389|ltq=Q907389|qid=Q907389|1=Mutsu Province}}
* {{ill|Oshika District, Miyagi|lt=Oshika district|ceb|Oshika Gun|en|Oshika District, Miyagi|fr|District d'Oshika|id|Distrik Oshika, Miyagi|it|Distretto di Oshika|ja|牡鹿郡|ko|오시카군|pl|Powiat Oshika|ru|Осика (уезд)|sr|Област Ошика|uk|Повіт Осіка|zh_yue|牡鹿郡|zh|牡鹿郡|qid=Q1131921|1=Oshika District, Miyagi}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|38.897888|141.55003}}

== dedicated to (P825) ==

* {{ill|Q24898144|ltq=Q24898144|qid=Q24898144|1=Haguro Gongen}}

== described by source (P1343) ==

* {{ill|Q135037878|ltq=Q135037878|qid=Q135037878|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)}}
** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20151121015552/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp:80/db/jinja/271501.html

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 182089
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}

== P14005 (P14005) ==

* {{ill|Q11123280|ltq=Q11123280|qid=Q11123280|1=Senior Fifth Rank}}
* {{ill|Q11071127|ltq=Q11071127|qid=Q11071127|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>

== country (P17) ==

* {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}}

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Kesemano Shrine|lt=Kesemano Shrine|qid=Q135040009|1=Kesemano Shrine}}
** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
